stories.title: Initialize Expo React Native project (latest)
stories.description: Create a new Expo (latest SDK) React Native app in this repo (TypeScript). This is a design-only build: no backend. Keep the app runnable on Android/iOS and Expo Web.
acceptanceCriteria: Repo contains an Expo app created with create-expo-app@latest (TypeScript)
App runs via Expo on Android/iOS simulators/devices and on Web (where supported)
Basic project scripts exist (start/lint/test if configured)
No backend/network dependency required to view the UI

stories.title: Recreate chatjournal.html UI as a React Native screen
stories.description: Convert the provided chat UI (chatjournal.html) into a React Native screen with the same layout, spacing, typography, and colors. Update text/labels per requirements: Rosebud -> Blackrose, remove the 'Internal Family Systems' line.
acceptanceCriteria: Header matches the HTML design (pill with avatar letter, name, dropdown icon, Drafts label, close icon)
Rosebud label is changed to Blackrose (including the avatar letter to 'B')
The 'Internal Family Systems' label is removed from the UI
Chat messages render with AI vs user styling matching the HTML (color/weight/size/line-height)
Main content scrolls and does not show scrollbars (where applicable)

stories.title: Implement footer controls and action buttons
stories.description: Build the bottom action area: mic/call icons, volume icon, and the two large action buttons (Suggest / Finish entry). Ensure safe-area handling and a polished, touch-friendly experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer layout matches HTML (icon row + two equal-width buttons + home indicator bar)
Buttons have press states and hit slop appropriate for mobile
Footer respects safe area insets on iOS/Android and does not overlap system UI
No text input/back-end integration is required

stories.title: Add practical responsiveness and light/dark theming
stories.description: Make the UI responsive across phones/tablets and on web. Implement light/dark theme support driven by system settings. Keep typography consistent (Inter) and match colors from the HTML.
acceptanceCriteria: Light and dark themes match the HTML color intent
Layout adapts to small phones and larger devices (centered max width on wide screens)
Uses SafeAreaView and consistent spacing across platforms
Inter font is used (or best-effort fallback) without runtime crashes
